step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("link between BCL11B haploinsufficiency and syndromic neurodevelopmental delay")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First state if you agree/disagree with the prior conclusion, then write at most two sentences explaining your rationale, ending with boxed letter.
Prior Conclusion: No
Evidence shows that BCL11B is not implicated in any known syndromes with neurodevelopmental delay. Instead, developmental delays are associated with other conditions such as Jacobsen syndrome (which involves FRA11B and other deleted genes), transient neonatal diabetes, or epilepsy—all independent of BCL11B expression or function.
